creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 198006
xmms2 patch

Hi, I have noticed xmms2 ports are failing on reacent head with new OpenSSL version.

I am proposing this patch which should allow it to build.

I have tested it on previous OS versions and it does not break it there, but I'm unable right now to test it with an updated head with OpenSSL 1.1.1, so I'm posting it here in case someone can test it and report back to me, so it can be committed.

Thanks!
